subject: Re: Performance Review Cycle

subject: Re: Performance Review Cycle
content:
Hi all,

Thanks for a productive Roadmap Sync today. Here's a summary of what we
decided:

DECISIONS:
- We will proceed with Option A for the Logging Service migration
(projected savings: $131K/yr)
- Zenith launch date moved to Q1 (from original Q2 target)
- HR team will own the OKR Planning workstream going forward

OPEN QUESTIONS:
- How does this affect the Pinnacle Analytics contract timeline? (Nate
to investigate)
- Do we need additional headcount for UX Designer? (Karen to assess)

Full notes: https://confluence.internal/330963b98584

Regards,
Leo

Best,
Leo Perez
VP of Product, Product
Lexcorp

subject: Re: Performance Review Cycle
content:
Hi Karen,

Quick update on Project Vanguard: we've completed the alpha phase and
are on track for the milestone. Key highlights:

- Migrated 62 services to the new API Gateway architecture
- Reduced uptime by 24% across all endpoints
- Identified 12 blocking issues (see JIRA-7653 for details)

The Engineering team has been instrumental in this effort. Leo has
volunteered to lead the next phase.

Let me know if you have questions.

Thanks,
Nate
